productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Zigfuel Black Yellow Shoe
description: The first of the ZigTech range of reebok shoes, the reebok ZigFuel is a huge favourite among those who love to run and feel the energy returning with every stride. Built with patented sole technology, the reebok ZigFuel maximizes energy return to the feet, offering a soft and springy ride: a complete energy drink for your feet that makes your key leg muscles so that you can do more.Fuel your every strideReplete with a DMX Sheer cushioning that minimizes shock on impact, and a PU sockliner that provides a smooth, cushioned and silky touch to the feet, the Reebok ZigFuel is one of the lightest cross trainers ever created.The upper is made of synthetic mesh and overlays for ample breathability and structural support. It is also employed with reflective properties to make tech shoe visible and safe even in low light conditions. Equipped with a padded tongue, collar and soft inner lining, the Reebok ZigFuel provides an absolutely snug and comfortable Fit.The outsole of the shoe is designed in the patented zig-zag pattern using DMX Shear foam. This is separated into a different panel altogether from heel to mid-foot and onto the forefoot to reduce impact on key muscle groups when running, providing a smooth heel to toe transition.Energetic from kick-offLight and energetic from the word Go, the Reebok ZigFuel reduces impact on the heel, which is especially beneficial for midfoot to heelstrike runners who land on their heels first. The Zig technology, coupled with the DMX Shear cushioning panels reduces impact and evenly distributes shock, returning maximum energy to the feet. This reduced heel stress and extra comfort allows you to run longer and stronger.In short, if you're looking for a shoe that adds fuel to your runs with that extra cushioned support and strainless experience for your shins, feet and glutes, the ZigFuel is what you need.Upper Mesh uppers with synthetic overlays provide breath ability Lace-ups for snug fit Cushioned collar, tongue and foot bed for extra comfort Soft, breathable fabric lining for comfort Mesh tongue for greater breath ability Play Dry lining on the insole for moisture management PU sockliner for added cushioning and support DMX Shear technology provides vertical and horizontal cushioning and reduces stress of heel impact Midsole Full-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning Outsole ZigTech's unique zigzag sole designed to optimize energy return, helps to propel you forward with each step and reduces wear and tear on your shins by 20% Forefoot flex grooves for flexibility and better running performance Multi-surface outsole for optimal traction TPU medial post for mid foot pronation control Carbon-rubber heel strike offers durability and traction on any surface Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
